name: Plundering Shipwreck at %LOCATION_NAME
description:
%PERSON_NAME delves into the dark twisting passages of the wrecked ship. Deep within the shattered hull they find an ornate chest, partially covered by wreckage. Should %PERSON_NAME risk the wreckage collapsing further in the hopes of retrieving the chest?

(Agent HP is currently %HP)

choices.name: Try to retrieve the chest
choices.description:
-25% chance to find a rare item

-75% chance to take 5 damage

outcomes.description: %PERSON_NAME finds themselves sliced by needle sharp rocks, propelled by unseen forces
%PERSON_NAME's efforts bear fruit, and a rare item is now yours for the taking

choices.name: Search in a safer portion on the shipwreck
choices.description: 25% chance to find a common item

outcomes.description: %PERSON_NAME finds themselves empty handed but unharmed after the expedition
%PERSON_NAME's searches in the safer parts of the shipwreck produce a modest find, perhaps the time was not wasted
